entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation passwordExpiryAudits Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String><?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE AuditEvent PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <AuditEvent action="Password Expiration Notification" application="IIQ" attributeName="email" attributeValue="mahesh.nattali@eshiam.com" created="1744700090766" id="c0a8000a961b152a8196383aa98e215d" source="spadmin" target="Mahesh Nattali"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="Expires On" value="8/05/2025"/> <entry key="Interval"> <value> <Integer>24</Integer> </value> </entry> <entry key="email" value="mahesh.nattali@eshiam.com"/> </Map> </Attributes> </AuditEvent> </String>
